dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal translated using sma_10 (10-period MA as specified), vol_ratio_20 (volume spike detection >110%), and rsi_14 (40-70 range for uptrend, 30-60 for downtrend). Stop loss set to 1 ATR equivalent (approximately 1% for typical assets). Profit target uses pivot points (r1/s1) as closest approximation to next resistance/support. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both trending up and trending down scenarios. Entry logic requires all three conditions (trend + volume spike + RSI in healthy range).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal translated using sma_10 (10-period MA as specified), vol_ratio_20 (volume spike detection >110%), and rsi_14 (40-70 range for uptrend, 30-60 for downtrend). Stop loss set to 1 ATR equivalent (approximately 1% for typical assets). Profit target uses pivot points (r1/s1) as closest approximation to next resistance/support. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both trending up and trending down scenarios. Entry logic requires all three conditions (trend + volume spike + RSI in healthy range).

source_rule_text: A trader should enter a strong trend when other traders are forced to exit profitable positions prematurely due to emotional inability to hold gains, creating a contrarian entry opportunity with reduced competition.
